title: brodiaea terrestris subsp. terrestris
intro: Brodiaea terrestris subsp. terrestris, also known as Golden Turley or Western Brodiaea, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Asparagaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. It is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and supporting digestive health. Brodiaea terrestris subsp. terrestris can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
